so a) in investigations engravings buffs your card with a specific orison, which does things, you can check the effects out and it's for the durations of that investigation
b) rousing in arc1 in stores n healing points n events makes the rouse card available for the whole investigation (arc2 requires keyflare rouse for every battle w/ a few exceptions), rouse use will give the corresponding awakener enhanced effect for that battle
